description: Created and pushed ralph-workflow-v0.8.8 tag to trigger PyPI CI publish pipeline
commit_message: fix(readme): tighten copy — clearer handoff framing, merge install+quickstart, stronger default-workflow signal
publish_failure_reason: PyPI Trusted Publishing likely not configured for Ralph-Workflow/Ralph-Workflow. The build job succeeded (package built + validated), but pypa/gh-action-pypi-publish failed in the publish job. Need either: (a) configure Trusted Publishing on PyPI for this repo/namespace, or (b) add PYPI_TOKEN secret to GitHub Actions and modify CI pipeline.
notes: Tag exists on GitHub remote. Once PyPI credentials/Trusted Publishing is configured, pushing the same tag again or triggering workflow_dispatch with a modified pipeline will publish v0.8.8 with strong README + Codeberg CTA to PyPI.
